---
language: swift
exerciseType: 1
---

# --instructions--

Erstelle eine neue Variable `revenue` und weise ihr die Differenz zwischen `earnings` und `costs` zu, dann gib seinen Wert aus

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --seed--

```swift
var earnings = 2000
var costs = 750
```

# --asserts--

`revenue` muss gleich der Differenz zwischen `earnings` und `costs` sein.

```swift
tryCatch(revenue == earnings - costs)
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
var earnings = 2000
var costs = 750
var revenue = earnings - costs;
```

# --output--

1250
